Our Story

Four Generations.
One Recipe.

Founder Juan Moré discovered the authentic Cuban bread recipe in a small Cuban town and brought it to Ybor City in 1915. Today, four generations later, his legacy lives on in every hand-baked loaf — produced around the clock, every single day.

1915 — Via Ybor

Juan Moré begins daily production for Ybor City's Cuban community.

Regional distribution expands

Growing demand takes La Segunda beyond Ybor City across Florida.

Nationwide frozen program launched

Proprietary par-baking preserves authentic taste coast to coast.

Today — 20,000+ loaves daily

The world's largest producer — still handcrafted the traditional way, 24/7.

Proofing the Dough

Fresh-Made Tradition. Made by Hand, Crafted by Heart.

Hand-Cut, Every Loaf

A Century-Old Tradition, By Hand.
Distributed By

Product Offerings

Baked Fresh.
Delivered Nationwide.

Every product ships frozen — 270-day shelf life, thaw-and-serve. Available through Sysco, US Foods, Cheney Brothers, Performance Food Group, and direct from our Ybor City bakery.

The Original

Authentic Cuban Bread

Available in 18" and 36" loaves

Crusty on the outside, soft on the inside. Made from high-gluten spring wheat flour created specifically for our bakery. Every loaf is finished with a freshly cut palmetto leaf — the century-old tradition that creates our signature split down the middle. The foundation of every authentic Cuban sandwich.

  • 18" Pack 24 loaves / case  ·  8 oz each  ·  270 days frozen
  • 36" Pack 20 loaves / case  ·  16 oz each  ·  270 days frozen
  • Allergens Wheat
  • Storage 0°F frozen / Thaw & Serve
↓ 18" Spec Sheet ↓ 36" Spec Sheet Get Pricing

Media Noche

Hoagie Rolls — 8"  ·  36/case

"Midnight Bread" — made with real eggs for a soft interior, subtle sweetness, and golden color. Named after Havana's late-night club scene. The classic Cuban sandwich roll, equally at home with any pressed sandwich.

↓ Spec Sheet Order

Coca Hamburger Buns

4"  ·  48/case  ·  Pre-Sliced

Hand-rolled, Spanish-style sweet bun — the sweetest of all our breads. Pillowy interior, tremendous flavor. Pairs perfectly with burgers, pulled pork, or pressed sandwiches. Pre-sliced and ready to serve.

↓ Spec Sheet Order
Honey Wheat

Honey Wheat Cuban Bread

18"  ·  24/case

Honey replaces sugar for outstanding natural sweetness. Made with 51% whole wheat flour. The healthy alternative with the same La Segunda character — ideal for schools, hospitals, bistros, and health-forward menus.

↓ Spec Sheet Order

Deli & Bucket Breads

White · Wheat · Rye · Marble · Sourdough · Pumpernickel

Full lineup of artisan deli loaves and bucket breads in six varieties. Available in small, large, and large round formats. Fresh-delivered locally — the same craft that goes into our Cuban bread, applied to your whole menu.

Why La Segunda

Built for Wholesale.
Proven at Scale.

20k+

Loaves Daily

Over 20,000 loaves produced around the clock — we never run short for our partners, day or night.

100%

Handcrafted

Every loaf is formed by hand and scored with the traditional palmetto leaf — authenticity in every detail.

4th

Generation

Over a century of recipe consistency — the same bread Juan Moré first baked in Ybor City in 1915.

24/7

Production

We bake around the clock and can deliver more if you need it — thousands of loaves on hand at any given time.

Getting Started

Simple to Start.
Reliable to Run.

01

Contact Giuseppe

02

Get Your Product Code

Giuseppe provides your product code for your Food Service Distributor and works directly with your sales rep.

03

Consistent Supply

Ongoing fresh or frozen delivery through your distributor — no disruptions, no shortcuts, no surprises.
